name: Azure Firewall Modified or Deleted
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of [MICROSOFT.NETWORK/AZUREFIREWALLS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/AZUREFIREWALLS/DELETE]
TD_list: APPLY Azure Firewall Modified or Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of [MICROSOFT.NETWORK/AZUREFIREWALLS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/AZUREFIREWALLS/DELETE]
RED_list: Event name: Azure Firewall Modified or Deleted
Event description: Identifies when a firewall is created, modified, or deleted.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 600 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
